property.name: query
property.label: SOQL Query
property.description: SOQL query with :recordId placeholder for dynamic binding

property.name: labelField
property.label: Label Field
property.description: API name of the field used for category labels

property.name: valueField
property.label: Value Field
property.description: API name of the field used for numeric values

property.name: seriesField
property.label: Series Field
property.description: API name of the field used for series grouping (enables stacked/grouped)

property.name: orientation
property.label: Orientation
property.description: Chart orientation: vertical columns or horizontal bars

property.name: variant
property.label: Variant
property.description: Chart variant: simple, stacked, or grouped

property.name: valueSuffix
property.label: Value Suffix
property.description: Suffix for axis values, e.g. M

property.name: height
property.label: Chart Height (px)
property.description: Height of the chart area in pixels
